transcript.text: Albert Stein was this guy's name he
called me on his deathbed and wanted me
to come and see him right away and he
said look he had to tell somebody about
this that he was a he was United States
Army uh was assigned as a clerk typist
to Project Blue Book so they went to
Area 51 they got taken to S4 and they
came to this area where there was this a
a big room with a two-way mirror in it
and there was an extraterrestrial being
there uh he he was like you know 5 and
1/2 ft almost 6 feet tall had a kind of
a light blue jumpsuit on that they'
given him and he was standing there uh
and this guy Albert wouldn't go near him
uh he was just traumatized by by the guy
and he said he he thought he was demonic
uh and didn't want to go near him
